query: Great Glen to Bretton Woods cross country ski race Pinkham Notch to Bretton Woods

videos.title: Great Glen Nordic 300 - 2008
videos.description: The Great Glen Nordic 300 is a 5-hour cross country ski race held annually at Great Glen Trails in Pinkham Notch, NH.

videos.title: Ski to the Clouds 2008
videos.description: Ski to the Clouds, "North America's Toughest 10k," is a 10 kilometer cross country ski race at Great Glen Trails in Pinkham Notch, NH. Skiers race 4k on the trail system at Great Glen Trails before climbing 2200 feet up the Mt. Washington Auto Road to finish at 4000 feet on the Northeast's highest peak. www.skitotheclouds.com

videos.title: January 11 at Great Glen Trails
videos.description: After the thaw, here's video proof of plenty of snow and great skiing at Great Glen Trails in Pinkham Notch, NH.

videos.title: A Day at Great Glen Trails
videos.description: A fun day skiing and tubing here at Great Glen!
